epoch_id.description: Epoch in which the stake was placed

pre_stake_balance.description: Agent balance before this stake was deducted

outcome.description: Current outcome. pending until governance gate resolves.

final_balance.description: Agent balance after outcome settled. 0.0 while pending.

_invariant_notes.STAKE-0: Record must exist in JSONL before balance is decremented in wallet
_invariant_notes.STAKE-DETERM-0: stake_digest must equal sha256(agent_id + ':' + mutation_id + ':' + str(staked_amount))[:16] prefixed with 'sha256:'
_invariant_notes.STAKE-BURN-0: When outcome=failed, final_balance = pre_stake_balance - staked_amount (full burn, no partial)
